engineering:debug.description: Systematic debugging skill — identifies root causes of errors, analyzes stack traces, inspects runtime behavior in the context of this Python/PostgreSQL scraper project (virtual env at .venv/, SQLAlchemy models, tenacity retry logic), and proposes targeted fixes.
engineering:debug.name: debug

engineering:code-review.description: Thorough code review skill — checks correctness, adherence to project conventions in CLAUDE.md (virtual env usage, SQLAlchemy patterns, deduplication via ON CONFLICT, SCRAPER_REGISTRY format), security, performance, and maintainability for this Python scraper codebase.
engineering:code-review.name: code-review
